Title: Relates to the date of enrollment in the child health insurance plan program; repealer
Summary: Eliminates the prospective enrollment waiting period for children under the age of nineteen enrolling in the child health insurance plan program by enrolling a child retroactively to the first day of the month in which they are approved for coverage under such program.
LawCode: Rpld §2511 sub 2 ¶(g), amd §2511, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to the date of enrollment in the child health insurance plan program; and to repeal certain provisions of such law relating thereto
